scripts.dev:docs: corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false -C docs install --ignore-workspace && corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false -C docs run dev
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false run build:packages && corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false -r --filter=./packages/* run typecheck && corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false --filter @bhjia-phys/hakimi run typecheck
scripts.lint:pkg: corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false -r --filter=!@bhjia-phys/hakimi-monorepo exec publint && corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false -r --filter=./packages/* exec attw --pack . --profile node16
scripts.publish: corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false run typecheck && corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false run lint && corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false run sherif && corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false run test && corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false run build && corepack pnpm --config.engine-strict=false run lint:pkg && changeset publish
